name: Slice Master
author: Poki
description: Slice Master is a one-button skill game where you flip a spinning knife through levels packed with objects to slice and obstacles to avoid. Every click sends you spinning through the air to slice fruits, foods and other objects . But one bad spin into spikes ends the run instantly. Play Slice Master for free at Poki and see if your skills are as sharp as the knife! How Slice Master works As the knife spins through the air, land on objects to cut through them and click to launch yourself toward the next target. Each slice adds to your score , but hazards like the pink spikes or gaps can instantly end the run if you click too early or too late. Most runs fail by a fraction of a second. If you hesitate slightly on when to click, you hit the pink spikes or fly past the objects. Adjust your timing by clicking slightly earlier , and suddenly you're slicing most objects and avoiding spikes at the same time. Controls Every move in Slice Master is controlled by a single action: Desktop: Click the left mouse button Mobile: Tap on the game screen Unlock new knives Earn cash during strong runs to unlock all 9 knives , each one showing how far you've made it since the start of the game. You start with the standard kitchen knife. The first unlock will cost you $5k, and they become more expensive over time . New knives don't make the game easier, as they are just for show. Only better timing lets you go farther and get higher scores. Getting higher scores in Slice Master Your final landing determines how much your score is multiplied. Landing on the right spot can massively boost your score. You can increase your score by landing one of the following multipliers: x2 x3 x5 x10 x25 x50 This works by taking the amount of cash you earned in the round and multiplying it by this number. The higher the multiplier, the more precise your final landing needs to be. Going for x50 means aiming for a tiny target instead of the easy landing. At first, you are just trying to finish levels.
